ddls:
CREATE TABLE "configuration_items" (
  "config_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each configuration item */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Group to which the configuration item belongs (e.g., core, security) */,
  "key_name" TEXT /* Key name of the configuration item */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration item */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the value (e.g., string, number, array) */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Flags associated with the configuration item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration item was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration item was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the configuration item is applied (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration item (e.g., active, deprecated, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration item */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value if the configuration item is not set */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the configuration item is mandatory */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* Validation rules for the configuration value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_items_flags FOREIGN KEY ("flags") REFERENCES flags ("flag_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_items_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_items_group_name FOREIGN KEY ("group_name") REFERENCES groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_items_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_items_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration group */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the group is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_parent_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., string, number, array) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "is_complex" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data type is complex */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* Validation rules specific to the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the flag is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is locked */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the role is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the permission is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* ID of the configuration item that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user who made the change */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configuration_items ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* ID of the configuration item that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "is_dismissed" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification has been dismissed */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the notification is urgent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configuration_items ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration link */,
  "source_config_id" TEXT /* ID of the source configuration item */,
  "target_config_id" TEXT /* ID of the target configuration item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the link is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_links_source_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_config_id") REFERENCES configuration_items ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_links_target_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_config_id") REFERENCES configuration_items ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* ID of the configuration item */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration item */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration item in this version */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the value in this version */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Flags associated with the configuration item in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when this version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of this version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is the current active version */,
  "is_rollback" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is a rollback */,
  "rollback_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rollback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configuration_items ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* ID of the configuration item */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the tag is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_tags_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_tags_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configuration_items ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "config_id" TEXT /* ID of the configuration item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the comment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment is active */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the comment is private */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_comments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_comments_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configuration_items ("config_id")
)
